dataclasses/KW_ONLY.name: KW_ONLY
dataclasses/KW_ONLY.description: A sentinel value used as a type annotation. Any fields after a pseudo-field with the type of KW_ONLY are marked as keyword-only fields. Note that a pseudo-field of type KW_ONLY is otherwise completely ignored. This includes the name of such a field. By convention, a name of _ is used for a KW_ONLY field. Keyword-only fields signify __init__() parameters that must be specified as keywords when the class is instantiated. In this example, the fields y and z will be marked as keyword-only fields:...
